last_agent_action: Observed canonical validation and benchmark evidence, marked the starter tasks completed, and stopped because promotion or deployment is now the next valid workflow action.

last_validation_results.summary: The validation-only readiness-evaluation workflow wrote canonical validation evidence.
The benchmark-only readiness-evaluation workflow wrote canonical benchmark evidence and satisfied the remaining mandatory gate.

resume_instructions: Read the objective, backlog, and work-state files before editing code.
Run the validation task before attempting benchmark execution or deployment workflows.
stop_conditions: Stop when deployment or promotion becomes the next valid action under existing PackFactory workflows.
Stop and escalate if the next action would require changing registry, deployment pointer, or promotion state directly.
